title: promote-qa.mjs accepts active sprint targets — pending-only guard missing
summary: scripts/backlog/promote-qa.mjs line 138 checks `status !== 'pending' && status !== 'active'`, meaning active sprints are silently accepted. The S93 story QA-INTAKE-PROMOTE specifies 'must be pending' and the unit test 'refuses to promote into an active or archived sprint' asserts exit code != 0 for active targets, but the script exits 0. Discovered while running the full test suite: `npm run test` reports 1 failure in tests/unit/qa-promote.test.ts.
repro: Create a sprint JSON file with status: 'active' and a qa-ticket fixture.
Observe: exit code 0; the sprint JSON gains the promoted story despite being active.
expected: Exit code non-zero with a message containing 'pending'. Source ticket file untouched.
actual: Promotion succeeds. Line 138 of promote-qa.mjs: `if (sprintData.status !== 'pending' && sprintData.status !== 'active')` — active is treated as a valid target.
logs: tests/unit/qa-promote.test.ts:194 AssertionError: expected +0 not to be +0 (exit status should not be 0)
